new_feature.description: New user-facing capabilities or major functional additions.

feature_improvement.description: Enhancements and quality-of-life improvements to existing features.

tech_debt.description: Refactoring, internal quality, dependency hygiene, and maintainability work.

maintenance.description: Keep-the-lights-on updates, small fixes, and routine upkeep.

testing_observability.description: Evals, tests, logging, monitoring, tracing, and reliability instrumentation.

dx_infra.description: Developer experience, harness, tooling, and infrastructure improvements.

innovation.description: Exploratory experiments and forward-looking ideas with uncertain payoff.

notes: Weights are approximate targets for horizon planning. Planner must explain category mix rationale vs recent history and these targets. Vision alignment is mandatory for every task.
